- [ ] Linked issue/task:
- [ ] Scope of change:

## Checklist
- [ ] Docs updated (API/spec/data-model/architecture/workflows/standards) per `docs/workflows/pr-checklist.md`.
- [ ] Tests/lint/typecheck run (or not applicable) and results noted.
- [ ] Changelog entry (or rationale if skipped) and prompt archive updated.
- [ ] Consent/i18n/a11y respected; no PII in errors/logs.
- [ ] Permissions/roles validated for new/changed actions.
- [ ] Media/attachment limits enforced (if applicable); RLS/tenant context applied.
- [ ] Webhooks/signatures/idempotency handled (if applicable).

## Notes
- [ ] Breaking changes? If yes, describe impact/mitigation.
- [ ] Follow-up tasks:
